name: GODAI TAIGEKI: NIDAN JUTSU (ELEMENTAL BEATDOWN: RANK TWO TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (*)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H, E, Mas *

This technique works like Godai Taigeki: Shodan Jutsu, except you launch elemental projectiles, dealing 3d6 damage to the targets. The following variants exist:

- Denpo no Jutsu (Raiton) [Electric]: Can be empowered up to 11d6.
- Doroga no Jutsu (Doton) [Earth]: Can be empowered up to 9d6. Material Focus - At least 25 lbs of earth, stone or mud nearby.
- Enga no Jutsu (Katon) [Fire]: Can be empowered up to 11d6.
- Gufuuken no Jutsu (Fuuton) [Wind]: Can be empowered up to 11d6.
- Hyourento (Hyouton) [Cold]: Can be empowered up to 9d6. Material Focus - 5 ft 3 of snow or ice nearby.
- Mizuteppo no Jutsu (Suiton) [Water]: Can be empowered up to 9d6. Material Focus - At least 25 litres of water nearby.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or the maximum indicated per variant (whichever is lower).
